reviews.title: Extremely Inflexible
reviews.text: I mistakenly booked their rooms during an extremely PEAK PEAK season, and was refused a refund even though they would be able to re-sell them with a snap of the fingers. Honestly, this was not the first time that I made a similar request but this is the FIRST time that I had failed to receive a positive reply. I did not do this on purpose and asked for a refund WAY ahead of check-in days. The staff was extremely unhelpful, unsympathetic to my situation and inflexible in their policy. Even with federal laws, the judges consider each case with sympathy. If they were this inflexible, I wonder why they need HUMANS to be working at the reservation department? I would NEVER EVER book with them again, EVER.

reviews.title: Not a very enjoyable stay experience
reviews.text: The hotel was about 20 minutes walk to the subway station and the no. 25 tram service stop at President Kennedy Laan. As such it is not very convenient to access. Nearest supermarket was about 25 to 30 minutes walk away and food outlets even further but you can always take the tram for two stops. The tram ride into the city centre takes about 40 minutes but it would be faster if you take the subway trains (about 15 minutes). The room was nice and comfortable. The day time Front Desk staff were alright except that they gave us incorrect information about the opening times of the nearest supermarket. We were told that the supermarket was "opened all days and all times" But it was not. Night duty  Front Desk staff asked me to go behind the Front Desk where the hotel lobby toilet was located to get a roll of toilet paper by myself. I checked but could not find any. When we checked out, the Front Desk female staff saw us walking towards her and she quickly looked down and pretended that she did not see us. We do not recommend this hotel.

reviews.text: The hotel was nice and modern, room was spacious and clean at arrival. However, there were a couple of things to complain about. When we arrived, we were asked to wait for an hour when they prepared the room (they offered a bigger room for us which was nice, bcs we were 3 people). So the waiting was ok. However, when we arrived to the room, all the amendments for the third person were missing: sofa bed was not made, towels missing etc. We stayed for two nights and no cleaning was done after the first night. The garbage bins were small and not emptied, toilet paper & soap run out so we needed to go to reception to ask for more. In addition the other elevator was broken throughout the stay. 18 floors and only one elevator, so the waiting took long.

The phone in my room wasn't working to call reception and when on the 10th floor it's not ideal!
I had to ring the restaurant to get the number for reception!
The hotel was clean and the breakfast spread was great with a large selection of fruit, cereal and juices.

Lunch in restaurant wasn't great as French fries were brought after ages and were cold!

Dinner is only a buffet in the evening and I ended up getting take away most nights.

Some staff were very friendly and helpful but there were a couple who were not and this let's the side down somewhat.

Overall stay was good and was safe for solo, female traveller.

reviews.text: Hi, We are currently staying at this hotel and the staff are very nice but to be honest the room although large and clean is seriously lacking in facilities. There is a coffee machine with small mugs which is good, a microwave and no plates or cutlery or bowls, a fridge and no glasses. I needed a pen and paper and they don’t even provide that here. No vanity products either that you would usually have in a hotel like this, only shower gel and shampoo, not even any conditioner! The hotel itself is quite a long way out of actual Amsterdam City and with a ten minute walk you can catch the metro in which is easy but it adds time and expense to getting in to the centre, the name ‘City Hotel’ isn’t quite it. I’m actually quite disappointed considering the calibre of the accord chain.

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: The hotel was absolutely perfect! We was looking for a hotel with a good location and this couldn't have been better! We was bang I'm the middle of the city and all the bars, shops and cafes was on out doorstep literally! The service in the hotel was amazing, every member of staff was so friendly and very helpful telling us everything we needed to know for our visit. The rooms were very clean and basic just what we needed and there was a safe and TV for extra comfort. The beds themselves was surprisingly very comfortable every night I had a good night sleep! The best thing about the hotel had to be the location and the staff, and the only thing I can fault is there was scaffolding up while we were staying but you couldn't help that! I would 100% stay again and I am already planning my next visit back to Amsterdam and city hotel!

reviews.title: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Exceptional Stay in Amsterdam!
reviews.text:
I had an outstanding experience at the Mercure Hotel Amsterdam. From the moment I arrived, the staff went above and beyond to make me feel welcome. The check-in was smooth and efficient, and I truly appreciated the warm hospitality throughout my stay.

The room was modern, spotless, and very comfortable, with all the amenities I needed for both work and relaxation. I especially enjoyed the cozy bed and the quiet atmosphere, which made for restful nights after exploring the city.

Breakfast was a highlight – fresh, delicious, and with plenty of variety to start the day right. The location was also perfect: convenient access to public transport, close to attractions, yet peaceful enough to feel like a retreat from the city buzz.

What really stood out was the exceptional service. Every interaction with the team felt genuine, attentive, and professional. They made my stay feel truly special.

I can wholeheartedly recommend Mercure Hotel Amsterdam for anyone looking for comfort, convenience, and outstanding hospitality. I’ll definitely be returning!

Le personnel était très à l’écoute et vraiment disponible. J’y ai passé six nuits et en suis sorti très très satisfait. Au niveau rapport qualité/prix en pleine période de gaypride c’était plutôt vraie aubaine. Le personnel a eu la gentillesse de m’autoriser un late Check-out de 2h plus tard gratuitement ce qui est chose assez rare dans de grands hôtels. Malgré la situation géographique de cet établissement, je le recommanderais à 100% pour des personnes qui ont besoin de regarder dans leur portefeuille ! Pour ma part, j’aimerais quand même lors de mon prochain passage à Amsterdam essayer pour une fois de séjourner en plein centre-ville! Merci

reviews.title: 2박 머물렀는데 직원들 서비스가 너무 별로
reviews.text:
조식이 포함된 옵션인데 포함 안 됐다고 하는거나, 업그레이드된 룸에서 말도 안 되게 시끄러운 기계 소리가 계속 나는 것까진 그럴 수 있다고 쳐도 이 숙소의 가장 최악의 점은 직원 서비스였음.

프론트 직원한테 환불 요청했다가 아고다한테 하라길래 아고다에서 신청하면 받아달라 했더니그러겠다고 했음. 그래서 아고다에서 환불 신청했더니 숙소에서 거절 메시지가 와서 황당했고 바로 내려갔으나 내려갈때마다 항상 이전 응대했던 직원은 사라져있어서 새로운 직원한테 또 새로 상황 설명하고. 직원등은 후속 f/u 처리를 하기 싫어서 일부러 응대한번 하고 바로 사라지는건가 싶음. 한 직원은 내가 말하는 문제에 대해 알라보려는 의지도 없이 무조건 '아고다에 말해라'고만 하길래, '그래도 문제가 있으니 알아봐줘야 되는 거 아니냐'고 대답하니까 '지금 너 톤이 문제다. 그거 때문에 내가 안해주는 거다'라는 식으로 대답함. 우리가 연인도 아니고 밀당하나 황당했음.

전세계 5성급 호텔들 많이 다녀봤지만 사실 호텔들 숙소가 좋아봐야 거기서 거긴데 이 경험을 통해 호텔에서 가장 중요한 건 룸 컨디션 자체보다 직원의 서비스라는 것을 깨닫게 됨

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
The hotel experience was honestly very disappointing.

The first shock was upon arrival: although we booked one reservation for two rooms and specifically requested the rooms to be next to each other, we were given separate rooms on different floors. The explanation we received was that the hotel was fully booked, and they could not arrange two adjoining rooms. We decided to stay quiet and not make a big issue.

However, once we entered the rooms, we were surprised by how poor the cleanliness was. The rooms were not properly cleaned, we could still see belongings left from previous guests, and there was even hair on the floor and furniture.

When we spoke to the staff about changing the rooms, the employee was initially cooperative and gave us new rooms. But unfortunately, the new rooms were also not clean. When we complained again, the staff member’s attitude was very unprofessional. 

Overall, the experience was extremely uncomfortable, and I would never choose to stay at this hotel again.

reviews.title: Mixed feeling
reviews.text: The location of the hotel is highly convenient, as it's just a short walk from the train station. The breakfast spread is quite extensive, but there is room for improvement when it comes to refilling the shaving dishes and sauces. It's unclear whether it's a hotel policy to not clean the rooms or change the linens daily, but during our two-night stay, we had to make do with the same towels. Additionally, the rubbish bin was not emptied, and the shower water pressure for washing was inadequate, especially considering we were on the 9th floor. The front office staff and service staff are proficient in their job, but they often appear unhappy and most of them don't smile  (with a few exceptions).

reviews.title: Close to City and Arena
reviews.positives:
We had a really lovely stay at Mercure Amsterdam City Hotel. Our twin room was very comfortable, clean, and perfect for relaxing after exploring the city. The breakfast was amazing with plenty of choice and everything was fresh and well presented.

What really stood out was how helpful and friendly the staff were throughout our stay. They even allowed us to store our luggage after check out until we were ready to head home, which made our final day in Amsterdam so much easier.

Overall, a great experience and we would happily stay here again. Highly recommended!

reviews.title: Great Value for Money
reviews.positives: Whenever I travel to Amsterdam, this hotel is my favorite place to stay. The location is perfect for how I like to travel. The hotel is outside the city and near the highway. I just exit the highway and park. There is a Metro station just five minutes away by walking which takes you to the city center in less than 10 minutes which is perfect. Near the hotel, you also have a small supermarket and a McDonalds if you want some late night snacks. The rooms are well sized and well equipped. The breakfast has a good selection as well. The check-in is always smooth and the onsite parking is expensive but a bit help if you are travelling by car. The bar downstairs in pretty basic and you can buy some drinks from the hotel's shop as the bar closes around 11:00 pm. Overall good value for money.  I will be booking again soon.
reviews.negatives:
A few things to mention for the team to improve:
1. The rooms can be better cleaned when they are made up during the stay. There was trash left in the baskets, some things left on the floor. I dont know if this is an environmental thing to not clean the room properly but you should look into it. 
2. The room doors on the 11th floor where I was staying have scratches on them. Please fix them and they are starting to look run down. 
3. The breakfast place needs a live egg station where we can get fried eggs etc. Its a very basic add but makes breakfast a better experience.

reviews.title: Could’ve easily been a 9-10 with better customer service.
reviews.positives: Room was big, bathroom was also large, high end looking hotel, clean
reviews.negatives: We booked this property 5 months in advance requesting an early check in due to the time of our arriving flight, originally the property said this would be subject to availability which is entirely understandable. I messaged them again the week of our arrival and they then said it was subject to availability but could be provided for a supplementary fee which I thought to be odd as this wasn’t mentioned beforehand. On the day of our arrival we got there at 10am and were told our room wouldn’t be available before 3pm, and while waiting we watched numerous other people be given keys to their room. On our second day, we told the front desk our AC wasn’t working and the soap in the shower was empty and asked for these things to be looked at. We were told this would be no problem and if they were unable to fix the AC they would leave a fan. When we came back at the end of the day, it was clear staff had entered our room (changed towels, made bed etc.) but there was no fan, the AC was not fixed, and the soap was still empty. We did not feel the staff at this hotel tried to accommodate us or make us feel comfortable in any way.

reviews.title: Excellent hotel with easy access to the Arena

We wanted to be in proximity to the Johann Cruiff Arena and so this hotel was in great location for that with easy access to the metro. 
We arrived early on a very busy day and the hotel staff did their best to give our family room earlier than the guaranteed check-in time - which I appreciated a lot. 
The hotel is modern, clean and just had everything we needed.
reviews.negatives: The area is not the city center so you do not get get the full Amsterdam vibe. But it is what we wanted for the purposes of our trip (easy access to the Arena)

reviews.title: Great comfort and excellent service at reasonable prices!

reviews.negatives: This is a “cashless” establishment. Meaning all transactions are done via credit cards and (international) debit cards. For those who come from other latitudes this could be an inconvenience. I also didn’t see an ATM on the premises, but i might be wrong. Also, kitchen closes at 9:00 pm and all you are left with are snacks from the hotel convenience store. For a place so visited, i would expect the kitchen to offer services until a bit later
